✦ ✨ ♡ ✧ ❀ 💫
for Shama

Before the memories begin…

✨ 💖 🌸 💫 🤍

This little space was made slowly, lovingly, and only for you — so the first thing you feel is not a webpage, but a warm beginning. One click, and the rest of my heart starts unfolding for you.

A little birthday universe for Shama ✨
9 March 2026 • turning 20 • and somehow still making my heart behave like it is meeting you for the first time

Happy Birthday,
Shama.

I did not want to hand you a predictable message. 💌 I wanted to build you something that opens slowly — like a feeling, like a memory, like the way you entered my life and quietly changed its temperature. ✨ So start here. One surprise at a time. ❤️

Memory 1 of 14

Somewhere Between A Smile And A Home

There are photographs that capture faces, and then there are photographs that quietly capture belonging. This one feels like the second kind. The way you exist in my life has turned ordinary moments into places I never want to leave. 🤍

Memory 2 of 14

The Smallest Flower, The Loudest Memory

You never needed grand things to become unforgettable. Even a tiny flower in your hand somehow became a full story in my heart. That is your magic, Shama — you make softness feel unforgettable. 🌼💗

Memory 3 of 14

You, Standing Next To My Peace

In crowded places, my eyes still learn the same habit — they look for you first. Not because the world disappears when you're near, but because it finally starts making sense. 🫶

Memory 4 of 14

A Night I Wanted To Keep

Some nights end and fade like smoke. But then there are nights like this — the kind that stay behind in the chest, glowing quietly. You have given me more of these living memories than you know. 🌙❤️

Memory 5 of 14

Every Flower Stall Reminds Me Of You

Not because flowers are pretty, but because they do what you do — they change the mood of an entire place just by being there. Brightness looks effortless on you. 🌹✨

Memory 6 of 14

Us, In A Frame The World Almost Missed

I love that some of our best memories do not look rehearsed. They feel found. Like life, for one small second, was kind enough to let me stand beside the person I would choose again and again. 💞

Memory 7 of 14

The Calm In My Favorite Chaos

We do not need perfect lighting, perfect timing, or perfect lines. Somehow, even in the simplest mirrors and most ordinary corners, you make a moment feel worth keeping forever. 🥹❤️

Memory 8 of 14

One Of My Favorite Kinds Of Happiness

There is a version of me that laughs easier, hopes harder, and breathes lighter. That version shows up around you. Maybe that is love too — not fireworks all the time, but becoming more alive because someone exists. 💘

Memory 9 of 14

Where Even The Sun Looked Softer

There is something almost unfair about the way you carry light, Shama. In this moment, even the afternoon felt like it had paused just to admire you. Your beauty was not loud — it was the kind that settles gently into the heart and stays there, making an ordinary day feel quietly blessed. ✨🤍

Memory 10 of 14

A Rose Was Never The Whole Gift

The rose was beautiful, yes — but it was only a small excuse to watch your hand in mine a little longer. Somehow even simple things become sacred when they pass through you. You turn tenderness into something visible, and I keep falling for that softness again and again. 🌹💗

Memory 11 of 14

My Favorite Kind Of Silence

I love this memory because it says so much without asking for words. Your closeness has always felt like peace, mischief, comfort, and home all at once. The world can stay noisy if it wants — when you are near, my heart already knows where to rest. 😘❤️

Memory 12 of 14

Even Our Shadows Knew

We laughed so much in the middle of small roads, random songs, and moments nobody else would have called special. But with you, joy has never needed a grand reason. Even our shadows looked in love, and even the silence between songs felt playful because it belonged to us. 🎶🫶

Memory 13 of 14

Sweet Things, Shared With You

I do not remember only the taste of the cake — I remember the sweetness of being there with you. Every little date, every bite, every stolen smile becomes dear to me because you are in it. Loving you has made even the smallest celebrations feel full and unforgettable. 🍰💛

Memory 14 of 14

Proof That We Make Moments Bloom

There is a kind of magic in the fun we create together — playful, goofy, affectionate, and so deeply ours. These frames are cute, but what they really hold is something rarer: your glow, your divineness, your laughter, and the way being with you makes every memory come alive a little brighter. 💌🌸

For the girl I love
💖 ✨ 🌷 🫶 🎂 💫

To my
Shama

Shama, 💖 I did not want to write you something ordinary, because what I feel for you has never felt ordinary to me. You are not just a beautiful part of my life. You are the quiet change that happened before I even understood it — the reason simple places began to feel warm, random days began to feel worth remembering, and small moments started carrying meaning I never used to notice. ✨ There is something rare about the way you love, the way you smile, the way you make even silence feel gentle. You do not just make my heart race; you make my world softer. Safer. Fuller. 🫶 On your 20th birthday, I do not only wish you happiness. I wish you the kind of year that feels like light finding you from every direction. I wish your dreams grow without fear. I wish your heart is protected, celebrated, and understood — the way it deserves to be. 🌷 And somewhere inside all of those wishes, there is mine too: that life keeps allowing me to witness you, to stand beside you, to love you in more ways than words can properly hold. 💫 Happy Birthday, my Shama. 🎂 You are one of the finest things that has ever happened to me. ❤️

my favorite reflection
a night worth keeping
you make ordinary shine
my happy place
made with love, on purpose
ॐ✦❁ॐ
A Divine Blessing ✨🕉️

For the soul who deserves love, light, and Shiva’s grace 💛

May Lord Shiva keep you protected, peaceful, and deeply loved always. 🕉️✨

May Mahadev place soft light on your path, courage in your heart, and calm in your soul. 🌙💫

May your smile stay bright, your heart stay gentle, and your dreams bloom beautifully in the right time. 🌸🤍

May this new year of your life bring pure happiness, kind people, quiet miracles, and endless blessings. 🌷💖

And on your birthday, may you feel surrounded by divine grace, warm love, and the sweetest peace. 🪔💛✨

With all my love 💖
